Chronology of every recorded fact about [[High Councilors (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — High Councilors stand except in certain special circumstances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — High Councilors include Kerian and Tyril.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan's notes on the Sleepless were intended for the High Councilors.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — High Councilors brief Shera personally on missions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The High Councilors stand around a table made of chalk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The High Councilors sent Shera on her mission.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Three High Councilors represent the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan considered that the High Councilors might have had selfish motivations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan prepared letters for the High Councilors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — The High Councilors are a group Shera mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Three High Councilors wait at the front of Shera's meeting.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
